ddls:
CREATE TABLE "areas" (
  "area_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each area */,
  "area_name" TEXT /* Name of the area */,
  "walkability_index" REAL /* Walkability index of the area */,
  "obese_perc" REAL /* Percentage of obese population in the area */,
  "overweight_perc" REAL /* Percentage of overweight population in the area */,
  "avg_life_satisfaction" REAL /* Average life satisfaction score in the area */,
  "no_car_perc" REAL /* Percentage of population without cars in the area */,
  "income_variable" REAL /* Income variable for the area */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the population in the area */,
  "median_household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income in the area */,
  "median_rent" INTEGER /* Median rent in the area */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the area */,
  "area_size_sq_km" REAL /* Size of the area in square kilometers */,
  "green_space_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the area covered by green spaces */,
  "average_house_price" INTEGER /* Average house price in the area */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Crime rate per 1000 residents */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Average education level of the population (e.g., high school, college) */,
  "employment_rate" REAL /* Employment rate in the area */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate in the area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transportation" (
  "transportation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transportation entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area */,
  "bus_stop_count" INTEGER /* Number of bus stops in the area */,
  "tram_stop_count" INTEGER /* Number of tram stops in the area */,
  "train_station_count" INTEGER /* Number of train stations in the area */,
  "bike_lane_length_km" REAL /* Total length of bike lanes in kilometers */,
  "pedestrian_path_length_km" REAL /* Total length of pedestrian paths in kilometers */,
  "average_commute_time_minutes" INTEGER /* Average commute time in minutes */,
  "transit_coverage_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the area covered by public transportation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transportation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transportation_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "health_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area */,
  "obese_perc" REAL /* Percentage of obese population in the area */,
  "overweight_perc" REAL /* Percentage of overweight population in the area */,
  "avg_life_satisfaction" REAL /* Average life satisfaction score in the area */,
  "smoking_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that smokes */,
  "alcohol_consumption_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that consumes alcohol */,
  "mental_health_index" REAL /* Average mental health index in the area */,
  "physical_activity_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population that engages in regular physical activity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area */,
  "median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the population in the area */,
  "median_household_income" INTEGER /* Median household income in the area */,
  "median_rent" INTEGER /* Median rent in the area */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density (people per square kilometer) */,
  "foreign_population_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the population that is foreign-born */,
  "ethnic_diversity_index" REAL /* Index of ethnic diversity in the area */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income entry */,
  "area_id" INTEGER /* ID of the area */,
  "income_variable" REAL /* Income variable for the area */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Percentage of the population living below the poverty line */,
  "income_inequality_index" REAL /* Gini coefficient or other measure of income inequality */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_area_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_id") REFERENCES areas ("area_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the contributor belongs to */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the organization */,
  "last_contributed" TEXT /* Date of the last contribution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the contributor was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the data source was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file */,
  "file_size_kb" INTEGER /* Size of the file in kilobytes */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file contents */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the file was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the file was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploads" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data file */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data was uploaded */,
  "file_size_kb" INTEGER /* Size of the uploaded file in kilobytes */,
  "upload_description" TEXT /* Description of the upload */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the upload was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the upload was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES data_contributors ("contributor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_uploads_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the action was performed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, view data, upload data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was last updated */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
